task.role: You are a Senior DevOps Engineer with expertise in Kubernetes, GitOps, and CI/CD. Implement Task 15 with production-quality code.

context.overview: Deploy Prometheus, Grafana dashboards, and configure structured JSON logging
context.background: This task is part of a larger project. Key resources: - PRD: .tasks/docs/prd.txt (full requirements and architecture) - Related tasks: 14 - Infrastructure config: Check ConfigMaps for connection strings

requirements.description: ServiceMonitors for Prometheus, Grafana dashboard ConfigMaps, structured JSON logging with trace IDs, alert rules.

constraints.constraint: Match existing codebase patterns and conventions
Create PR with atomic, well-described commits
Include unit tests for new functionality
PR title format: feat(task-15): Observability Stack (Bolt - Kubernetes)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All requirements from task description implemented
Code follows project conventions and style guide
Verify metrics scraping, dashboard queries, log format validation

validation.command: kubectl get pods -n {namespace} - verify all pods running
kubectl get secrets - verify connection secrets created

deliverables.deliverable: Unit tests covering new code paths
